data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the persona scenario outcome.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires a deterministic validation of the scenario behavior, specifically regarding the audit trail showing 'AI agent' versus human actor. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete results or traces that confirm this functionality is implemented or functioning as required. The linked use cases and prior step evidence do not provide sufficient detail to ascertain whether the expected outcome can be achieved, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence confirming the audit trail functionality or the ability to differentiate between AI agent and human actor.
